## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss FOSSA's content strategy, website migration, and registry feedback with GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content work stream to focus on "Alternatives" pages (e.g., Snyk alternative, Black Duck alternative)](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Website migration showing positive early signals; some cleanup still needed (e.g., mobile performance, old blog subdomain)](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [Registry page structure feedback provided; next steps include making tweaks and planning for batch releases](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)

## Topics

### Content Work Streams

  - [Decided to focus on a new work stream ("Alternatives") rather than refining existing OWASP Top 10 content](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Will start with obvious comparisons and expand to adjacent tools](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Team to propose 2 initial alternatives in Slack for review](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Website Migration Progress

  - [Positive early signals: keywords picking up, desktop Core Web Vitals look good](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Areas for improvement:](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - [Mobile performance needs optimization](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - [Old blog subdomain (blog.fossa.com) still being crawled](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [Some duplicate title tags and descriptions to address](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Registry Page Feedback

  - [Structure suggestions:](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [Enhance title tag with relevant keywords (e.g., license, vulnerability, popularity)](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [Include package name in more headers](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Improve meta description with layman's terms](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Content enhancements:](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [Add internal linking to related packages](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [Consider adding FAQ section](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
      - [Explore interactive elements (e.g., timeline of updates, package comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)

### Registry Launch Strategy

  - [Start with a conservative batch (500-1,000 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [Theme batches if possible (e.g., all Ruby gems)](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Ensure proper sitemap implementation and submission to Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Manually force indexing of sitemap and individual pages](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Add registry to site footer and possibly top navigation](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Implement manual interlinking from other site areas](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to propose 2 initial "Alternatives" pages for new content work stream](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [FOSSA team to review and implement registry page structure feedback](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [Investigate and fix sitemap issues to improve indexing](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [Plan first batch of registry pages for release (500-1,000 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [Add registry to site footer and improve internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and addressing remaining migration cleanup items](https://fathom.video/share/LB8K9H2Cx-qWJpV-gGZs3JURXK9SoyeX?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
